reference: Hi, I have had to deal with depression since my teens. I am now in my early 60s. This last time was one of the worst. When I am not depressed, I am enthusiastically productive and almost unrealistic in my confidence. I also have chronic pain management issues with fibromyalgia. Juvenile rheumatoid arthritis resolved in my early 20s. One of my brothers has bipolar disorder. Could I possibly be dealing with some degree of bipolar disorder?
text: Hi, I have had to deal with depression since my teens. I am now in my early 60s. This last time was one of the worst. When I am not depressed, I am enthusiastically productive and almost unrealistic in my confidence. I also have chronic pain management issues with fibromyalgia, juvenile rheumatoid arthritis resolved in my early 20s. One of my brothers has bipolar disorder. Could I possibly be dealing with some degree of bipolar disorder?
